nasb.text: Then Joshua rose early in the morning; and he and all the sons of Israel set out from Shittim and came to the Jordan, and they lodged there before they crossed.

esv.text: Then Joshua rose early in the morning and they set out from Shittim. And they came to the Jordan, he and all the people of Israel, and lodged there before they passed over.

cnv.text: 約書亞清早起來，和全體以色列人從什亭出發，來到約旦河，在那裡住宿，等候過河。

ccb.text: 约书亚清早起来，率领全体以色列人离开什亭，来到约旦河边安营，等候过河。
